title: Vespa
description: A 1.20.1 Forge Mod that adds different types of "VESPAS" to the game
body:
![Vespa Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e26c77a0af21c6558f3f230012f517ea52ba82d.png)

THE VESPA MOD IS RELEASED

This mod adds 4 different "Vespas" or Scooters that can be driven to make mobility a little easier

![All4Vespas](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf8c8ed6852166ececbfb3a45e065838c0f92494.png)

The 4 different variants are based on 4 of the main ores in the game

### Iron
![IronVespa](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63a9809db00e5fc30d664218cbdf13b4d32a63f4.png)

Basic Speed, 20 HP, 1 Step Height

### Gold
![GoldVespa](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/025f1ce6c74be7615aa6d06195dc892af21de9ce.png)

Increased Speed but Not Too Fast, 25 HP, 1 Step Height

### Diamond
![DiamondVespa](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb21c9fb6dbd58601dda4d3425b01268bd0e4e45.png)

Good Speed, 35 HP, 1 Step Height

### Netherite
![NetheriteVespa](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fea94c6f513755c00f004c99cb059931497545c.png)

Top Tier Speed, 40 HP, 1.5 Step Height

**3 Items Needed To Craft Vespas**
![Wheels,HandleBars,Seat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29570240b3a0d22a5c01c05c73df4a784b4f1350.png)

I don't know if I will continue to update this mod but it was a fun project and may be updated if I get any ideas

For Any Issue,Questions, Or Suggestions email: kaweomods@gmail.com
